content: agent2: implementing path_transform param for template loaders in src/jinja2/loaders.py (FileSystemLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader). Will touch loaders.py only. Let me know if you're also touching this file.

Ack. I'll add path_transform as a new optional kwarg to BaseLoader-derived classes' __init__ (added at the end of arg list) and apply it inside get_source via a small helper. For FileSystemLoader I'll add path_transform after followlinks, transform template at the top of get_source before split_template_path, but keep TemplateNotFound raised with the ORIGINAL template name. I'll use targeted Edit calls (not full-file rewrites) so your fallback_searchpath changes to __init__/get_source/list_templates should merge fine as long as you also use targeted edits. Will ping when done.

Heads up: I just checked src/jinja2/loaders.py and don't see fallback_searchpath there yet — file only has my path_transform changes right now. My path_transform work is done and tests pass (841/841). FileSystemLoader.__init__ now has signature (searchpath, encoding='utf-8', followlinks=False, path_transform=None) and get_source() starts with 'pieces = split_template_path(self._transform_path(template))'. Please add fallback_searchpath as a new kwarg after path_transform (or wherever) using targeted Edit calls against the CURRENT file content so we don't clobber each other. I'm done touching loaders.py now.
